name: Agent Wake Protocol
description: General-purpose LIFE gateway lifecycle manager for OpenClaw multi-agent systems. Handles agent registration, Genesis interview, and wake protocol for any agent configuration.

agentIdMap.description: Map of OpenClaw agent names to LIFE agent_ids. Example: { "main": "my-agent-v1" }

agentIdSuffix.description: Suffix used when deriving a LIFE agent_id from an OpenClaw agent name (e.g. 'finance' + '-v1' = 'finance-v1'). Override if your naming convention differs.

sessionPrefix.description: Only inject context for session keys with this prefix. Narrow to 'agent:main:' to target a single agent.

commandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each mcporter command.
